releaseRules._comment: Major releases are intentionally blocked from automation; breaking changes require a manual release workflow

plugins.publishCmd: npm publish -w mod-arch-core --provenance --access public && npm publish -w mod-arch-kubeflow --provenance --access public && npm publish -w mod-arch-shared --provenance --access public && npm publish -w mod-arch-installer --provenance --access public

plugins.successComment: 🎉 This change has been released in [v${nextRelease.version}](${releases[0].url}).
